title: HTTP
excerpt: description: Facilitate Worker-to-Worker communication by forwarding Request objects. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Worker A that declares a Service binding to Worker B can forward a [Request](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/runtime-apis/request/) object to Worker B, by calling the `fetch()` method that is exposed on the binding object.
